name: team_task_list
description: List and filter tasks in the team's structured task system. Supports filtering by parent task, lifecycle states, priority levels, and assigned agent. Use this to get an overview of team workload, find tasks in specific states, or navigate the task hierarchy. Team context is automatically inferred from the agent's team membership.

parent_task_id.description: Filter to only show direct children of this parent task. Omit to show top-level tasks.

states.description: Filter tasks by one or more lifecycle states

priority.description: Filter tasks by one or more priority levels

agent_id.description: Filter tasks assigned to a specific agent

include_subtree.description: If true and parent_task_id is set, include all descendants recursively, not just direct children

limit.description: Maximum number of tasks to return

offset.description: Number of tasks to skip for pagination

examples.name: List all tasks ready for execution
List tasks assigned to an agent
